message:
Executed DbCommand (200ms) [Parameters=[@now='?' (DbType = DateTime2), @now1='?' (DbType = DateTime2)], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='300']
SELECT [r].[Id], [r].[Channel], [r].[EventId], [r].[IsSent], [r].[RemindAtUtc], [r].[SentAt], [r].[SnoozeUntilUtc], [c].[Id], [c].[CalendarId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedByUserId], [c].[Description], [c].[EndUtc], [c].[EventTypeId], [c].[ExceptionOccurrenceStartUtc], [c].[IsAllDay], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Location], [c].[MeetingLink], [c].[OwnerUserId], [c].[ParentEventId], [c].[RecurrenceRuleId], [c].[ShowAs], [c].[StartUtc], [c].[Status], [c].[TimeZoneId], [c].[Title], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedByUserId], [c].[Visibility]
FROM [dbo].[Reminders] AS [r]
INNER JOIN [dbo].[CalendarEvents] AS [c] ON [r].[EventId] = [c].[Id]
WHERE [r].[IsSent] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [r].[RemindAtUtc] <= @now AND ([r].[SnoozeUntilUtc] IS NULL OR [r].[SnoozeUntilUtc] <= @now1)
